icp.title: Filings & Records
icp.subtitle: Mainland China compliance information.
icp.disclosure: These records are issued by Chinese regulators. <link>Official ICP lookup</link>.

home.title: Ship your global SaaS in days, not months.
home.subtitle: Auth, billing, i18n, email and analytics — wired up so you can focus on what matters: your product.

fast.title: Fast by default
fast.desc: Next.js App Router, edge-ready middleware and a tuned build pipeline.

global.title: Global from day one
global.desc: i18n routing, locale detection and CDN-first delivery.

secure.title: Secure foundations
secure.desc: Hardened headers, rate limiting and battle-tested auth flows.

pricing.title: Pricing that scales with you
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.

twoFactorChallenge.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactorChallenge.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or one of your backup codes.

errors.wrongCode: That code didn't match. Try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentDetail: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox.

errors.rate-limited: Too many requests. Please try again in a minute.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password you haven't used before.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can now sign in.

missing.title: Reset link missing
missing.description: This page needs a reset token. Request a new email to continue.

errors.expired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.invalid-input: Please check your input and try again.

success.title: Email verified
success.description: Your email has been confirmed. You're all set.

expired.title: Link expired
expired.description: This verification link has expired. Request a fresh one below.

invalid.title: Link invalid
invalid.description: This verification link is invalid or has already been used.

resend.title: Verify your email
resend.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a fresh verification link.
resend.sentDetail: If an account exists for that email and isn't yet verified, we've sent a fresh link.

errors.rate-limited: Too many requests. Please try again in a minute.

errors.email-taken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.invalid-input: Please check your input and try again.

home.subtitle: Here's a snapshot of your account.
home.checkoutSuccess: Payment confirmed — your subscription is now active.
home.verifyEmailNotice: Your email isn't verified yet. Verify it to secure your account.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Plan, renewal and invoices.
billing.freeBlurb: You're on the Free plan. Upgrade to unlock paid features.

invoices.title: Invoices & payment methods
invoices.description: Manage payment methods and download past invoices in the Stripe portal.
invoices.empty: No invoices yet — invoices appear here after your first paid period.

errors.portal: Could not open the billing portal. Please try again.

account.title: Settings
account.subtitle: Manage your profile, security and account.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your display name. Email is the canonical identifier and cannot be changed here.
profile.emailHint: To change your email, contact support.

security.title: Password
security.description: Change your password. You'll be signed out and asked to log in again.
security.hint: Use at least 8 characters. We recommend a passphrase.

errors.noPassword: This account uses social sign-in only.

connected.title: Connected accounts
connected.description: Sign in with these third-party providers in addition to your password.
connected.noProviders: No OAuth providers are configured for this deployment.

errors.lastLoginMethod: You can't disconnect your only sign-in method.
errors.notLinked: This provider isn't linked to your account.

apiTokens.title: API tokens
apiTokens.description: Personal tokens for the API. Each token is shown exactly once at creation.
apiTokens.revealedHint: We won't show it again. Store it in a secret manager.
apiTokens.confirmRevoke: Revoke this token? Any clients using it will lose access immediately.
apiTokens.empty: No active tokens. Create one above to get started.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.descriptionShort: Devices with an active session on this account. Revoke any you don't recognize.
sessions.description: This invalidates every issued session token, including the one on this device. You'll need to sign in again afterwards.
sessions.confirm: This will sign you out on every device. Continue?

errors.generic: Could not sign out other sessions.
errors.cannotRevokeCurrent: Use "Sign out everywhere" to end the current session.

dataExport.title: Export your data
dataExport.description: Download a zip with everything we hold for your account: profile, OAuth links, memberships, audit, sessions. The link is auth-gated and expires after 7 days.
dataExport.queued: Export queued. We'll email you when it's ready (usually within a minute).
dataExport.limit: You can request a new export at most once every 24 hours.

banner.message: Your account is scheduled for deletion on {date}. You can cancel any time before that date.
banner.error: Could not cancel deletion. Please try again.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.descriptionDisabled: Add a second factor to your sign-in to protect against password leaks.
twoFactor.descriptionEnabled: An authenticator app is required at sign-in.
twoFactor.enrollIntro: Open your authenticator app and either scan the QR code (coming soon) or enter the secret manually.
twoFactor.backupIntro: Save these one-time codes somewhere safe — you can use them to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator. Each code works only once.
twoFactor.regenerated: Backup codes regenerated. The previous codes are no longer valid.
twoFactor.disableIntro: Confirm your current 6-digit code or a backup code to turn off 2FA.
twoFactor.enabled: 2FA enabled. From now on you'll be asked for a code at sign-in.

errors.wrongCode: That code didn't match. Try again.
errors.alreadyEnabled: 2FA is already enabled. Disable it first if you want to re-enroll.
errors.noEmail: Your account has no email address — set one before enabling 2FA.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

danger.title: Delete account
danger.descriptionShort: Schedule your account for deletion. You have 30 days to change your mind.
danger.description: Your account will be scheduled for deletion. You have 30 days to sign back in and cancel; after that, all data is permanently removed and irrecoverable.
danger.confirmDialog: Schedule deletion? You'll be signed out and have 30 days to cancel by signing back in.

errors.ownsOrgs: You're still the owner of {count, plural, one {# organization} other {# organizations}} ({names}). Transfer ownership or delete those orgs before deleting your account.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Search, audit and manage user roles.

reset2fa.confirm: Reset 2FA for this user? They'll need to re-enroll on their next sign-in.
reset2fa.done: 2FA reset. The user has been notified by email.
reset2fa.error: Could not reset 2FA for this user.

errors.selfDemote: You can't remove your own admin role.

apiTokens.title: API tokens
apiTokens.subtitle: All personal access tokens issued by users.

stripeEvents.title: Stripe events
stripeEvents.subtitle: Processed Stripe webhook events (used for idempotency).

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

runtime.title: Something went wrong
runtime.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

tfa.title: Two-factor authentication required
tfa.description: {org} requires every member to have 2FA enabled before accessing the workspace.
tfa.note: Once you enable 2FA in Settings, return to your dashboard and the wall will lift automatically.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: POST events to your own URL when things happen in this organization. The signing secret authenticates the call.
webhooks.empty: No endpoints yet — add one to start receiving events.

actions.deleteConfirm: Delete this endpoint? Pending deliveries will be canceled.
actions.rotateConfirm: Rotate the signing secret? The current one will stop working immediately.

secretRevealed.title: Copy your signing secret now
secretRevealed.body: This is the only time we'll show the secret in full. Store it in your application's secret manager. Lose it and you'll need to rotate to a new one.

errors.blockedHost: URL points to a private / loopback address.
errors.forbidden: Only owners or admins can manage webhooks.

deliveries.title: Recent deliveries
deliveries.subtitle: The 50 most-recent attempts. Click any row to inspect payload + response.
deliveries.empty: No deliveries yet — fire an event from this organization and they'll show up here.

require2fa.descriptionDisabled: Members can sign in without 2FA. Enable to require all current and future members to have 2FA on.
require2fa.descriptionEnabled: All members must have 2FA on. Members without it are walled off until they enroll.
require2fa.enabled: Org now requires 2FA for all members.

errors.callerNeeds2fa: Enable 2FA on your own account first, otherwise you'd lock yourself out.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Manage who has access to this workspace.
members.confirmTransfer: Transfer ownership? You'll lose owner permissions.

errors.cannot-demote-owner: The owner role is reserved — transfer first.

invite.title: Invite a teammate
invite.description: They'll receive an email with a link to accept.

errors.already-member: This person is already a member.

settings.title: Organization
settings.subtitle: Workspace name, URL slug and danger-zone actions.
settings.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and dashes. 3–40 chars.

basics.title: Basics
basics.description: How this workspace appears across Kitora.

errors.invalid-slug: Slug must be 3–40 chars, lowercase / digits / dashes.

danger.description: Permanently delete this organization. All subscriptions, tokens and members are removed. This cannot be undone.

errors.slug-mismatch: The slug you typed doesn't match.
errors.personal-org: Personal orgs are deleted via the account settings.

invite.subheader: You've been invited as a {role}. The invitation was sent to {email}.
invite.mustSignIn: Sign in (or sign up) using {email} to accept.
invite.switchAccount: Sign in with a different account

invalid.title: Invalid invitation
invalid.body: This invitation link is invalid or has been revoked.

expired.title: Invitation expired
expired.body: Ask the organization admin to send a fresh invitation.

alreadyAccepted.title: Already accepted
alreadyAccepted.body: This invitation has already been used.

errors.invalid: Invitation link is no longer valid.
errors.wrong-email: Sign in with {email} to accept this invitation.
